title: My features!
description: A real object is better than a simple texture.
body:
## General
this is a mod that adds its own characteristics and crafts to objects from the pack textures, because real objects that will be several times stronger than Netherite ones will obviously be useful in the game [[create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/versions?g=1.20.1&l=forge) required]
